---
name: "💡 FeBe Proposal or Feedback"
about: "Suggest an improvement to the methodology, update a rubric, or share real-world feedback."
title: "[PROP/FEEDBACK]: <Short description>"
labels: "proposal"
assignees: ""
---

## 🎯 Type of Issue
Please check the box that best describes your issue:
- [ ] **Methodology Proposal:** Suggesting a change to the core rules (e.g., the 3-round cap, constraints).
- [ ] **Template/Rubric Update:** Suggesting improvements to the evaluation rubrics or forms.
- [ ] **Real-World Case Study:** Sharing how implementing FeBe went at your company (successes or friction points).
- [ ] **Other:** General discussion or questions.

---

## 📝 Description
Provide a clear, concise overview of what you are proposing or the feedback you want to share. 

<!-- Your description here -->

## 💡 The "Why"
What specific hiring friction point, redundancy, or bias does this proposal solve? Why is this change necessary for keeping the pipeline optimized for execution over audition performance?

<!-- Explain the reasoning behind your suggestion here -->

## 🛠️ Proposed Solution / Changes
If you are suggesting a change, what would the new wording, rubric criteria, or matrix layout look like? (Feel free to link to a draft or write it out below).

<!-- Your proposed solution or changes here -->

## 📊 Context (Optional)
If this is based on real-world hiring data, your company size (e.g., startup, enterprise), or a specific engineering level (e.g., Junior, Senior), please include that here to help us understand the scope.

<!-- Additional context here -->
